signupData.goalsElaboration: Alpine ski racer (amateur/masters level). Off-season focus on leg power, stability, injury prevention, core strength, explosive power, single-leg strength. 8 months until ski season.
signupData.locationElaboration: Full commercial gym access plus some home equipment for quick sessions
signupData.injuries: Previous MCL sprain (right knee), manages with prehab and stability work.
signupData.experienceElaboration: 2 years serious training. Alpine ski racer training year-round. Off-season strength focus, in-season maintenance. Prefers explosive movements, plyometrics, heavy single-leg work. Mon/Tue/Thu/Sat mornings, 60-75 min.

onboardingMessages: I'm an alpine ski racer and it's my off-season. I want to build leg power, stability, and explosiveness for next season - 8 months away.
I go to a commercial gym and also have some stuff at home. Mon/Tue/Thu/Sat mornings, 60-75 min sessions.
I had an MCL sprain on my right knee before so I do prehab and stability work. I love plyometrics and heavy single-leg exercises.
